entry.title: IDC 91003123D0004 (P00020) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR 7009 - USDS - PROXY PAYMENT UPDATE, UPDATE THE ADDRESS VALIDATION REQUIREMENTS RELATED TO BORROWER DEFENSE PROCESSING SWEET REFUNDS, AND MAKE AN ADMINISTRATIVE CORRECTION TO A SPELLING ERROR.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0004 (P00021) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR6927 - FY24 - FINANCIAL AUDIT HANDOUTS - NON - DEFAULTED LOANS AND CR6979 - USDS - SERVICER REPORTING REVISIONS. FSA MAKES CHANGES TO THE VARIOUS SECTIONS AS DETAILED IN EACH HANDOUT OR ATTACHMENT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR 7037 -SDR- USDS STUDENT DEBT RELIEF DISCHARGE PROCESSING. ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0004 (P00027) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO INCORPORATE CR 7125 - USDS SERVICER INFORMATION PORTAL INTEGRATION WITH AIMS MFA - NELNET. NELNET ADDED FOUR(4) NEW URLS THAT WILL NEED TO BE INTEGRATED WITH THE AIMS SYSTEM. THIS IS A CONTINUATION OF CR 6889.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC 91003123D0004 (P00029) awarded to MISSOURI HIGHER EDUCATION LOAN AUTHORITY, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE PRICING STRUCTURE DUE TO THE LATEST EMPLOYMENT COST INDEX RELEASE, IAW THE ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT TERMS METHODOLOGY WITHIN THE CONTRACT CLAUSES. THE REVISED PRICES ARE EFFECTIVE SEPTEMBER 1, 2024.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER ACTIVITIES RELATED TO CREDIT INTERMEDIATION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
